overview: Yusuf Power is a Nigerian electricity vending platform where users can buy prepaid electricity tokens by entering their meter number, selecting their DisCo, and paying via Paystack. The app validates meters, displays customer details, and delivers a 20-digit vending token with copy and WhatsApp sharing.
features: Multi-step electricity purchase flow (meter input → validation → confirmation → payment → token)
DisCo selection dropdown with all major Nigerian utility providers
20-digit token display with copy-to-clipboard and WhatsApp sharing
Transaction history with full receipt view
Admin dashboard showing revenue and recent transactions
Secure backend API placeholders for Vtpass meter validation and token purchase
Mobile-first green and white Nigerian design
